'''Marina Stele''' was the wife of [[Kerek Stele]] and mother of [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Biography==
Marina Stele's husband was a famous [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] who was abducted by the [[Bordal]]i during their war with [[Kuan]], in the hopes of making him serve them. When he proved uncooperative, they decided to abduct his family, too, in order to persuade him. Marina and Maarek fought their attackers but were both captured and taken to a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] for transport to [[Bordal]].

During the flight, the ship was captured by the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Vengeance II|''Vengeance'']], which was taking part in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] invasion of the [[Taroon system/Legends|Taroon system]]. After some time spent as prisoners on the ''Vengeance'', Maarek agreed to serve aboard the ship, while Marina returned to Kuan to help with the transition to Imperial control and continue the search for her husband.
